feed.title: SkillsLLM

author.name: SkillsLLM & the MCP / Claude Skills ecosystem

feed.subtitle: AI tooling news and guides: SkillsLLM, Desktop Commander, Model Context Protocol, FastMCP, ClaudePluginHub, MCP Servers blog, Claude Skills Hub, and Glama (blog + release notes)

entry.title: antigravity-awesome-skills
entry.content: Plugin-safe Claude Code distribution of Antigravity Awesome Skills with 1,396 supported skills.

entry.title: vanguard-frontier-agentic
entry.content: Cloud and zero-trust agentic workflow marketplace for skills, agents, rules, MCP references, and compliance-aware architecture.

entry.title: rebeca-elmudesi
entry.content: Claude Code plugin for Rebeca Elmudesi — branded presentations and documents about her art via stromy-format, plus self-service website and brand asset editing via asset-broker

entry.title: penalista-italia
entry.content: Kit operativo per avvocati penalisti italiani: strategia difensiva, redazione atti, calcolo termini e prescrizione, misure cautelari, ricerca giurisprudenziale, esecuzione penale. 9 skill specializzate sul processo penale italiano. Di Synthos Logic.

entry.title: spec-anchor
entry.content: Spec-anchored development — compile bounded, auditable engineering context for coding agents

entry.title: tempo
entry.content: Turn a natural-language date/time problem into correct, validated Tempo (Elixir) — ISO 8601 / IXDTF representation plus relations, set algebra, recurrence, scheduling, and constraint networks — and get a plain-language answer.

entry.title: marketing-offers-tool
entry.content: SvelteKit tool for marketing teams to manage aggregator offers (Wolt, Bolt) and track offer performance.

entry.title: agent-toolkit
entry.content: A collection of project-agnostic skills for common engineering tasks such as ticket refinement, planning, code reviews, agent memory hygiene, skill authoring, and more.

entry.title: shaughv-code
entry.content: Emmett Shaughnessy's personal Claude Code plugin — bundles all custom SHAUGHV skills (critical thinking, OpenAI audio, PreText, Quiver AI, a comprehensive Mistral AI API skill covering OCR, audio transcription, text-to-speech, chat, agents, and the full API surface, SHAUGHV brand design, animated brandmark, human changelog, SHAUGHV CDN consumer guide, naming conventions, generic Google Cloud Storage reference, a pre-wired SHAUGHV-bucket GCS skill, bug triage, GoF code design patterns, a debugging framework, defensive programming, git workflow, a security audit & red-team skill, a session handoff document generator, an iterative milestone-planning method, a workflow-optimization facilitator, image generation, a fal.ai Crystal image upscaler, deliberate learning, logical reasoning, personal productivity, the /spawn orchestration playbook, strategic thinking, the standing subagent model/effort preference convention, the wb300 git branch / worktree / agent control tower, a usage status-line installer, and the TT;DR "Too Tired; Didn't Read" summary convention), the Remotion documentation and Craft Docs MCP servers, and a /create-video slash command for scaffolding Remotion Recorder projects, so everything is available across every Claude Code instance from a single source. (The task + workplace-memory system now lives in the standalone shaughv-tasks plugin.)

entry.title: obsidian
entry.content: Create and edit Obsidian vault files including Markdown, Bases, and Canvas. Use when working with .md, .base, or .canvas files in an Obsidian vault.

entry.title: llm-council
entry.content: A council of 3 to 5 forced-divergent AI advisors that peer-review each other anonymously, then a chairman commits to one sharp verdict. The lightweight, zero-infra day-to-day decision tool.

entry.title: clawdcursor
entry.content: Safe cross-OS desktop & browser control for Claude Code — the fallback execution layer for when APIs, CLIs, and direct integrations aren't available. Registers the clawdcursor MCP server in compact mode and bundles its usage skill (the SKILL.md at the repo root). Requires Node.js 20+; the MCP server launches via npx, which fetches clawdcursor on demand (or uses your global install if present) — no separate install step.

entry.title: web-uplift
entry.content: Fully agentic modern-web quality auditing and fixing. The model gathers multi-modal evidence via raw-CDP primitives, judges 15 declarative principles against Modern Web Guidance, and hill-climbs guidance-backed fixes. No hard-coded checks, no fast path. Runs in your own agent session (your subscription).

entry.title: my-skills
entry.content: 个人 Claude Code skill 集合

entry.title: nervepack
entry.content: Personal AI context hub: skills (behavior), sources (curated technical refs), wiki (LLM-owned synthesis), and re-runnable Ubuntu setup. Karpathy-style LLM-wiki layer on top of a skill library.

entry.title: surface
entry.content: Make software legible to agents. One skill that routes to the right workflow: audit agent readiness, scaffold agent infrastructure, generate MCP servers, write context files, or fix specific gaps.

entry.title: skillbooks
entry.content: Put an editor between your AI and the send button: cold-read a draft before you send, edit to Economist style, strip AI-writing tells, quote-check a claim, keep a durable worklog, render markdown to PDF.

entry.title: zensu
entry.content: Product Lifecycle Manager — Features as First-Class Citizens

entry.title: nvidia-kaggle
entry.content: Claude Code plugin for Kaggle competition workflows.

entry.title: laceyp99-skills
entry.content: laceyp99-skills — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: themekit
entry.content: ThemeKit SwiftUI design-system skill — tokenized components, runtime theming, theme presets, chainable modifiers.

entry.title: session
entry.content: 汎用 Claude Code セッション管理プラグイン（spawn/fork/ready-compaction/enforce）

entry.title: keyhole
entry.content: Hand a secret to your AI coding agent through a localhost form — the value reaches a store by reference and never enters the chat context

entry.title: sealos
entry.content: Deploy local or GitHub projects to Sealos Cloud, connect cloud databases and S3 object storage, generate Dockerfiles and Sealos templates, assess cloud-native readiness, and build Sealos Desktop apps.

entry.title: princi
entry.content: Your personal context engine. Bootstrap any AI task by instantly warming up with relevant emails, Drive docs, Slack threads, and meeting decisions — before writing a single line of code.

entry.title: aaron-marketing
entry.content: 120 marketing skills and 8 commands on one shared contract, arranged as a four-layer marketing operating system — Strategy (brand narrative), Channels (SEO/GEO, organic social, email, paid ads, influencer), Orchestration (product launch), and a shared Protocol layer of truth registries and memory. SEO/GEO (keyword research, content creation, technical audits, schema markup, programmatic/parasite/local SEO, site architecture, AI-traffic, monitoring), influencer marketing (audience insight, discovery, campaign planning, outreach, amplification, ROI tracking), paid ads across the ROAS loop, email marketing across the SEND loop, product launch across the RAMP loop, organic social across the ECHO loop (channel portfolio, voice dossiers, platform norm cards, calendars, platform-native creative, advocacy, social-quality audit, inbox/crisis ops, listening/SOV/dark-social measurement), and brand narrative & messaging across the TALE loop (message/positioning-truth tracing, durable message house, brand voice + naming canon, story bank, surface cascade, pitch narrative, enablement, proof packaging, the NQS gate, message testing, resonance and drift monitoring), plus a shared protocol layer (entity/creator/offer-claim/consent/launch/channel/narrative truth registries, project memory) serving all seven. Frameworks: CORE-EEAT, CITE, C3, ROAS, SEND, RAMP, ECHO, TALE.

entry.title: cidd
entry.content: 오라클 가용성에 따라 단계마다(plan·build·review) 모양이 다른 멀티에이전트 개발 플러그인. plan=lens 마찰, build=gen-verify-repair, review=하드 오라클+lens advisory(게이트 아님).

entry.title: doc-mirror
entry.content: The doc-mirror claude system: a 1:1 documentation mirror of any codebase, maintained by an invariant doc-mirror STATE MACHINE (per-module doc(m), 6 context/ index files, fork-on-change, no random documents). Bundles doc-mirror-boot (entry + core-loop prime + router), the doc-mirror-{init,seework,change,prompts} state-skills, doc-mirror-install (the host-setup WIZARD), ship-a-plugin (the build+distribute dev-flow), doc-mirror (THE LAW), and make-ai-operating-system (the architect for new systems of this class); the brainhook work-loop + session-start + transition-guard + readonly-guard hooks (plugin-native via CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT); the journal/projects/vision/plan/tracker/commit/cursor + docmirror-search CLI tools; and the doc-mirror law + behavior rules.

entry.title: subrosa
entry.content: Persistent, private memory for Claude Code — every session archived into a local, searchable SQLite database. What's said under the rose stays under the rose.

entry.title: hackathon-skills
entry.content: Eleven guided skills that take a non-technical team from an empty laptop to a judge-ready single Docker image (React + Node/Go + SQLite), including a one-shot hackathon-deploy that builds, checks, zips, pushes, and goes live.

entry.title: token-per-prompt
entry.content: 질문(턴)별 토큰 사용량을 답변 아래와 상태줄에 표시하고, 세션 전체 리포트 표를 제공합니다. 100% 로컬, 토큰 소모 0.

entry.title: ideaspaces
entry.content: Local-first knowledge space for Claude Code. A markdown folder, agent skills, git as sync. Optional remote sync when you're ready.

entry.title: dev-pipeline
entry.content: Multi-agent development pipeline simulating an engineering team: requirements analysis, technical design, module breakdown, TDD implementation, validation, code review, and fix cycles

entry.title: shepherd
entry.content: Sprint-by-sprint version-cycle conductor. Six-agent flock (engineer, critic, coder, auditor, worker, discovery) on a three-section pipeline (INTRODUCTION → BODY → CLOSE), with hardened hooks, hypothesis-driven audits, and a per-project SQLite context registry. Project-agnostic — branch topology, gates, paths, and ledger discipline configured via .claude/shepherd.toml.

entry.title: pyobfus
entry.content: Protect Python source before shipping it — obfuscate AND verify the output still runs. Wraps the pyobfus obfuscator (AST-based, framework-aware, AI-debuggable) and its MCP server.

entry.title: praxis
entry.content: The natural scientist's harness for Claude. Domain-agnostic core: a lab of scientist-agents that run the full scientific method over real data — paper reader, domain expert, analyst-coder, skeptic, interpreter, teacher, next-steps planner — plus a typed cache engine with mechanically-enforced integrity (pcache/pbuild/pvalidate) and a fast /init memory-prime. Install a domain pack (praxis-lvk gravitational waves, praxis-pta pulsar timing arrays) to turn it into an expert co-scientist on that field.

entry.title: chronicle
entry.content: Skills that help your agent track research hypotheses and experimental results on the Chronicle platform, with role-filtered search over past experimental results and uploaded research documents. Via the methodic-research SDK or the bundled MCP server (call Chronicle directly, no SDK install): research surveys, hypothesis-driven experiment + variation generation, history/lineage search, prep/fork variations, dataset upload, organizing assets + experiments into topic collections and keyword tags, report write-ups with figures, cross-variation distillation (review-gated takeaways), bulk research-PDF import into org libraries (server-side math OCR + role-filtered indexing), lifecycle (delete open drafts, retract committed work, purge orphaned assets, move into an org), status, and reading your activity feed (the needs-you queue, your inbox, new reports, research recs) with an explicit per-section read pointer.

entry.title: qwlabs-skills
entry.content: qwlabs-skills — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: etix-mcp
entry.content: Etix event discovery for Claude — search events, venues & performers and fetch event details

entry.title: thailand-pdpa
entry.content: Guides compliance with Thailand's Personal Data Protection Act B.E. 2562 (2019). Covers consent framework, DPO requirements, PDPC enforcement, lawful bases for processing, cross-border transfer mechanisms, and data subject rights under the...

entry.title: secure-data-destruction
entry.content: Implements NIST SP 800-88 Rev. 1 media sanitization procedures including Clear, Purge, and Destroy methods for all media types. Covers certificate of destruction generation, verification procedures, vendor management for third-party...

entry.title: konoha
entry.content: A squad of Konoha ninja (reusable subagents) that power four dev-workflow skills: /scroll (draft an issue), /mission (ticket to Draft PR), /debrief (resolve the reviews on your PR), and /exam (review a colleague's PR). Inspired by thk, but where thk has one entrypoint, konoha shares one cast across four skills. Naruto-themed skin over a neutral engine.

entry.title: ssh-mcp-pro
entry.content: SSH MCP Pro plugin for controlled SSH operations, remote host workflows, command execution guardrails, and infrastructure automation.

entry.title: eli5-gate
entry.content: Pre-implementation necessity gate for GitHub issues: plain-language intent ELI5, staleness/necessity verdict against post-filing history, and a plan-approval checkpoint before any code is written.

entry.title: retention-schedule
entry.content: Designs and implements data retention schedules compliant with GDPR Article 5(1)(e) storage limitation principle. Maps data categories to retention periods with legal basis justification, regulatory minimum holding periods, and automated...

entry.title: make-no-mistakes
entry.content: Make AI coding agents prove their work — frozen specs, budgeted verification loops, hard gates, an independent blind verifier. No unverified work passes.

entry.title: humanizer
entry.content: Two skills: humanizer removes signs of AI-generated writing from text; ai-check scores AI-tell density with quoted evidence. Based on Wikipedia's "Signs of AI writing" guide.

entry.title: doctail
entry.content: Revisor, simplificador e auditor de documentação técnica, operacional, comercial, CRM, automações, processos, playbooks e bases de conhecimento.

entry.title: special-category-data
entry.content: Identifies and classifies GDPR Art. 9 special category data including racial origin, political opinions, religious beliefs, trade union membership, genetic, biometric, health, and sexual orientation data. Covers processing conditions under...

entry.title: aws-best-practices
entry.content: Unofficial source-linked AWS best practices for every service, organized by Well-Architected pillar, use case, and scenario-targeted answer flow. Independent project, not affiliated with AWS.

entry.title: ecom
entry.content: Agent skills for running a Shopify store with a coding agent: catalog cleanup (category taxonomy, audits, SEO metadata, alt text, Matrixify), URL redirect mapping, JSON-LD structured data, and landing-page ideation. The playbook companion to Shopify's official AI toolkit. Distilled from real agency work.

entry.title: cast
entry.content: CAST — Claude Agent Staged Team. Installs a staged multi-agent development workflow into your project via the /cast-init skill: 15 specialist subagents, /agent-plan, /agent-code, /agent-task, and a docs/templates/artifacts scaffold.

entry.title: gaspatchio
entry.content: Actuarial modeling skills for gaspatchio (Python + Rust/Polars).

entry.title: sbom
entry.content: Generate a Software Bill of Materials (SBOM) from your AWS environment and scan for vulnerable/compromised packages.

entry.title: tcf-v2-implementation
entry.content: Implementing the IAB Transparency and Consent Framework v2.2 for programmatic advertising consent management. Covers CMP registration, Global Vendor List integration, TC String encoding, publisher restrictions, and compliance validation.

entry.title: report
entry.content: Generate professional compliance reports (Markdown, HTML, PDF) from the latest scan data.

entry.title: hyphasma
entry.content: A knowledge network for coding agents, checked into your repo as a wiki-linked Obsidian vault. Any doc in 3 hops or less, new knowledge bases researched and welded in as you work, and linters that fail CI when anything rots.

entry.title: supplementary-measures
entry.content: Guides implementation of technical, contractual, and organisational supplementary measures for international data transfers per EDPB Recommendations 01/2020. Covers encryption, pseudonymisation, split processing, audit rights, transparency...

entry.title: soc2-privacy-audit
entry.content: Guides SOC 2 Type II Privacy Trust Services Criteria preparation and audit execution. Covers AICPA TSP Section 100 Privacy criteria P1-P8 including notice, choice/consent, collection, use/retention/disposal, access, disclosure, security...

entry.title: singapore-pdpa
entry.content: Guides compliance with Singapore's Personal Data Protection Act 2012 (PDPA). Covers PDPC advisory guidelines, Do Not Call Registry, data intermediary obligations, deemed consent, notification requirements, and the 2020-2021 amendments...

entry.title: last30days
entry.content: Research any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, Hacker News, Polymarket, GitHub, and 5+ more sources. AI agent scores by upvotes, likes, and real money - not editors.

entry.title: stripe-api
entry.content: Comprehensive API reference for the Stripe payments platform. Covers every endpoint for payments, customers, subscriptions, invoices, products, prices, checkout, connect, billing, issuing, terminal, treasury, identity, tax, radar...

entry.title: fable5-skills
entry.content: 10 Fable 5-native Agent Skills for Claude -- effort routing, scope fencing, no gold-plating, evidence-bound progress, act-on-sufficiency, verifier subagents, autonomy contracts, lesson memory with an anti-poisoning gate, reader-first summaries, and refusal-aware API calling.

entry.title: debug-recorder-mcp
entry.content: Debug Recorder MCP plugin for debug session capture, incident replay, diagnostic search, and operational debugging history.

entry.title: threat-advisory
entry.content: Generate a personalized threat advisory based on your tech stack — what CVEs, breaches, and supply chain attacks matter to YOU.

entry.title: review-access
entry.content: Run a periodic IAM access review — lists all users, permissions, activity, and flags issues. Required quarterly for SOC 2.

entry.title: soc2
entry.content: Expert SOC 2 compliance assistant covering all five Trust Services Criteria (Security/CC, Availability/A, Confidentiality/C, Processing Integrity/PI, Privacy/P). Use this skill whenever a user mentions SOC 2, Trust Services Criteria, SOC 2...

entry.title: transfer-impact-assessment
entry.content: Guides the post-Schrems II Transfer Impact Assessment process following EDPB Recommendations 01/2020 six-step methodology. Covers destination country surveillance law assessment, European Essential Guarantees evaluation, and supplementary...

entry.title: retention-impact-assess
entry.content: Conducts retention impact assessments for new processing activities to determine appropriate data retention periods. Covers regulatory requirements scanning, proportionality review, purpose-based retention determination, and retention...

entry.title: health-monitor-mcp
entry.content: Health Monitor MCP plugin for service health checks, uptime monitoring, CI pipeline status, dashboards, and alerting workflows.

entry.title: cloudcat
entry.content: Scan data files (CSV/JSON/Parquet/Avro/ORC, compressed) in S3, GCS, Azure, or on disk with the cloudcat CLI: schema discovery, filtered NDJSON sampling, metadata-fast counts, column profiling

entry.title: right-to-object
entry.content: Handles GDPR Article 21 right to object to processing, including compelling legitimate grounds assessment, ceasing processing obligations, documentation requirements, and the relationship with erasure under Article 17(1)(c). Activate for...

entry.title: flora
entry.content: Generate Flora diagram syntax and render interactive flowcharts — architectures, pipelines, dbt lineage — from natural language.

entry.title: right-to-erasure
entry.content: Implements the GDPR Article 17 right to erasure (right to be forgotten) workflow, covering all six grounds for erasure, five exceptions, technical deletion versus anonymization decisions, and third-party notification under Article 19...

entry.title: selecting-privacy-enhancing-technologies
entry.content: Comprehensive PET selection guide covering differential privacy, homomorphic encryption, secure multi-party computation, federated learning, zero-knowledge proofs, and trusted execution environments. Includes use-case matching matrix...

entry.title: jobfinder
entry.content: Ground Claude with your resume/CV and search Australian job listings (Adzuna + Workforce Australia), rank matches, tailor applications, and track your pipeline. Geolocked to Australia.

entry.title: remote-work-monitoring
entry.content: Establishes boundaries for monitoring remote and hybrid workers including screen capture, productivity tracking, camera and microphone activation, attendance verification, and activity logging. Applies proportionality principles...

entry.title: tripadvisor-mcp
entry.content: MCP server for the TripAdvisor Terra API — location search, details, photos, and reviews

entry.title: auto-fde
entry.content: FDE delivery kit for Claude Code: discover a team's workflows, plan a skill catalog, build their plugin, review it, eval it, and deploy it — with review gates at every phase.

entry.title: telehealth-privacy
entry.content: Implements telehealth privacy compliance covering HIPAA requirements for virtual care, state licensing and recording consent laws, platform security with BAA requirements for telehealth vendors, cross-state prescribing rules, and OCR...

entry.title: server-side-tracking
entry.content: Implementing server-side tracking with privacy controls using Google Tag Manager server containers. Covers first-party data collection, IP anonymization, consent-aware event forwarding, and reducing client-side third-party cookie exposure.

entry.title: track
entry.content: Track CLI and JJ workspace task management skills for AI agents

entry.title: snowflake
entry.content: Build Rust data pipelines that extract from Postgres, transform with Arrow, and load into Snowflake via S3 + warehouse COPY INTO. Use this skill whenever the user mentions: Rust Snowflake loader, Postgres to Snowflake, Arrow to Parquet to...

entry.title: remediate
entry.content: Get interactive remediation guidance for compliance findings, including Terraform code and step-by-step instructions.

entry.title: scc-implementation
entry.content: Guides implementation of EU Standard Contractual Clauses under Commission Decision 2021/914 across all four modules (C2C, C2P, P2P, P2C). Covers clause-by-clause completion, Annex I-III drafting, and SCC module selection. Keywords: SCCs...

entry.title: retention-exception-mgmt
entry.content: Manages retention exception workflows including request-approval processes, duration limits, periodic review cycles, documentation requirements, and audit trail maintenance. Covers legitimate grounds for extending retention beyond...

entry.title: search-engine-erasure
entry.content: Implements the right to be forgotten in search engines under GDPR Article 17 and the CJEU Google Spain ruling (C-131/12). Covers delisting request procedures, criteria assessment balancing privacy against public interest, and geographic...

entry.title: risk-register
entry.content: Create and manage a SOC 2 risk register — auto-seeds from scan findings, tracks treatment, produces audit evidence.

entry.title: chameleon
entry.content: Code that blends in. Auto-derives codebase conventions and injects archetype-aware guidance for AI-generated code.

entry.title: faf
entry.content: Persistent Project Context for AI — IANA-registered .faf format. Run /faf to score your project in Claude Code; install the CLI via `bunx faf` or `npm install -g faf-cli` for the full toolkit.

entry.title: remote-guard
entry.content: Forces a yes/no approval before any remote/cloud command (gcloud, gsutil, bq, aws, az, kubectl, ssh, scp, terraform) and container registry push/login (docker, podman, nerdctl), classifying read vs write, with a /unguard bypass toggle (session-scoped, timed 30m/2h, or persist).

entry.title: m3
entry.content: Local-first persistent memory for Claude Code — 101 MCP tools, hybrid search (FTS5 + vector + MMR), bitemporal contradictions, GDPR primitives, chatlog auto-capture, multi-agent handoffs.

entry.title: tierward
entry.content: Governance skills for AI-assisted development: commit enforcement, architecture compliance, security audits, code quality, and humanized prose.

entry.title: amaris-consulting
entry.content: Claude Code plugin for Amaris Consulting branded deliverables, brand tools, and strategic deliverable planning

entry.title: antigravity
entry.content: Run the Antigravity CLI (Gemini) as a collaborating AI inside Claude Code, with intelligent model routing across the SDLC. Claude conducts — requirements, architecture, the hard 20%, verification, review — and routes deterministic, high-volume work (scaffolding, tests, first-pass review, migrations, web/Vertex AI Search) to Antigravity. Hybrid agentic engineering; lower token cost as a financial lever.

entry.title: vgv-wingspan
entry.content: VGV Wingspan - AI-native workflows following Very Good Ventures best practices.

entry.title: agentheim
entry.content: DDD-flavored agentic harness: Socratic vision modeling, bounded contexts, parallel workers, decision records

entry.title: astra-methodology
entry.content: ASTRA (AI-augmented Sprint Through Rapid Assembly) methodology plugin for Korean enterprise software development. Provides Sprint 0 project initialization, Design Thinking-based planning (/service-planner), blueprint authoring (/blueprint), sprint-level isolated worktrees (/sprint-init), integration testing (/test-run), AI-assisted UAT (/user-test, /uat-parallel with vi|en|ko report-language selection), PR merge automation with integration-branch model (/pr-merge), a mostly-unattended full pipeline (/autorun), and a Target-driven convergence loop with adversarial verification (/loop — mandatory max-iteration HITL, frozen rubric, exit at score ≥ 90 with zero P0s or at max iterations). Enforces coding conventions (Java/TypeScript/React Native/Python/CSS/SCSS), the Korean public data standard dictionary, international code standards (ISO 3166-1/2, ITU-T E.164), design system SSoT (DESIGN.md), and quality gates via read-only validator/reviewer/persona agents. Per-version change rationale: docs/development/changelog-v5.md.

entry.title: agentdeals
entry.content: Search and compare free tiers, credits, and pricing changes across 1,500+ developer tools. Find deals for databases, hosting, CI/CD, monitoring, and 50+ categories.

entry.title: anycloud
entry.content: Run AI workloads — training, fine-tuning, evals, batch inference — on the cheapest available cloud GPU across AWS, GCP, Azure, Lambda, CoreWeave, and other clouds. Multi-cloud BYOC; spot-aware with automatic preemption recovery.

entry.title: muse-derivative
entry.content: MUSE 衍生写作姊妹包：同人 / 续写 / 番外 / 跨风格改编。入口 derivative-writing 与 muse-writing 主干几乎一致——跑 pipeline 前用 init_derivative_run.py 按 reuse_mode（fan_fiction/sequel/spin_off/cross_style_rewrite）把原作可继承的 phase 设计 yaml 从 canon 蒸馏物 / 用户已有 pipeline 预置到 work_dir，phase1-5 检测到已有 yaml 就在其上完善（否则从零生成），下游消费与 muse-writing 一致。自含整条衍生 pipeline（phase0-7 + 辅助 skill）；可选依赖 muse-canon-distill 取蒸馏物作继承基线。

entry.title: super-pm
entry.content: Product Manager Skills Pack - 39 skills across 5 modules: demand insight, solution design, growth iteration, risk management, and product strategy

entry.title: jaas
entry.content: Teach Claude to author and operate JaaS — evaluate Jsonnet over HTTP, and publish JsonnetSnippet / JsonnetLibrary resources as Flux ExternalArtifacts.

entry.title: openclaw-docs
entry.content: Authoritative, daily-refreshed OpenClaw documentation lookup. Bundles a Claude skill (with local lookup CLI + flattened markdown indexes) and a hosted MCP server (vector + trigram search, structural field-check, section extraction, version listing). Use to ground OpenClaw factual claims and prevent hallucinated config fields.

entry.title: speculator
entry.content: Speculator — spec quality scoring and a 7-gate pipeline (4 required + 3 opt-in: eval intent, eval quality, comprehension — each bindable to spec risk levels) with LLM-as-judge evaluation, git worktree isolation, and beads issue tracking. Quality In, Quality Out.

entry.title: korean-dart
entry.content: OpenDART 83개 API → 15개 MCP 도구. 금융감독원 전자공시(DART) 기반 AI 리서치 — 공시 검색·재무·XBRL + 버핏 애널리스트 프레임(insider_signal · disclosure_anomaly · buffett_quality_snapshot) + HWP/PDF 첨부 마크다운화

entry.title: brain-os
entry.content: Second Brain OS — 16 skills for knowledge management, deep thinking, and vault operations powered by Obsidian.

entry.title: claude-tdd-pro
entry.content: Drop-in plugin that elevates any codebase to Google's published engineering standards (eng-practices, JS/TS style, Python style). /analyze produces a citable compliance report; /remediate executes a small-CL plan that ratchets the codebase toward the bar; every greenfield prompt is gated by the same RUBRIC.yaml. Hardened against prompt-injection, secret-leakage, and protected-branch commits. Auto-disclosure via Assisted-by: trailer.

entry.title: agentforge
entry.content: Single-source, multi-runtime agent tooling for core-be: skills, agents, workflow commands, and the requirement to production-ready build pipeline, all driven from agent-os/.

entry.title: skill-bill
entry.content: Portable AI skill suite centered on feature implementation and code review, currently strongest for Android, KMP, Kotlin backend, and agent-config repositories, with room to expand to additional stacks.

entry.title: leopold
entry.content: An autonomous orchestration harness for Claude Code: brief it like a teammate, it conducts Claude Code in your seat, deciding from your charter with git locked.

entry.title: onfire-mcp-skills
entry.content: Skill tree for the Onfire MCP. Includes an orchestrator skill that routes user intent across five atomic skills (one per Onfire tool) covering identity resolution, AI prospecting, contact enrichment, and prospecting schema configuration, plus an account-research skill that generates full BDR briefs by combining Onfire MCP, Snowflake EDGAR 10-K filings, and Metabase intent signals.

entry.title: switchboard
entry.content: Cross-team communication, devcontainer orchestration, and tool proxying for agent teams. Provides crosstalk, dispatch, connector, and evie-bot bridge tools via MCP.

entry.title: rhdp-publishing-house
entry.content: AI-powered content lifecycle management for RHDP — from idea to ready-for-publishing

entry.title: devant
entry.content: A single-command, intent-aware coding companion. Onboards by scanning the repo with its own built-in graph, captures the project's vision/direction/non-goals/rules as a local intent graph you own, and works like a teammate who knows what to do and what NOT to do. Lean, fast, ceremony scaled to blast radius. Everything it stores stays local and is never committed.

entry.title: heavyskill
entry.content: Heavy Thinking as the Inner Skill in Agentic Harness — spawns K independent parallel reasoning agents then performs critical sequential deliberation. Implementation of arXiv:2605.02396v1.

entry.title: b00t
entry.content: b00t plugin for Claude Code - extreme programming agent framework with datum system, direnv pattern, and DRY philosophy

entry.title: filipkrawiec
entry.content: Agentic software engineering skills for grilling plans, domain-driven design, and writing effective reusable skills.

entry.title: cc-skills-utils
entry.content: Utility skills for Claude Code — discovery, git operations, plugin management, and general tooling.

entry.title: dream-studio
entry.content: Dream Studio — local-first AI orchestration and operational intelligence platform.

entry.title: astramem
entry.content: Slash commands + auto-capture hooks bridging Claude Code to AstraMemory. Provider selector routes between local and SaaS backends. Bun-native TypeScript CLI. Fail-silent ingest log. Bearer scrubbing at every output sink.

entry.title: software-development-ht0x
entry.content: A curated set of skills for software development teams, covering technical documentation, design docs, task specs, RFC/ADR authoring, spec-driven development, algorithmic art, and learning systems.

entry.title: ask
entry.content: Agent-to-human request inbox. A single-binary inbox designed for AI coding agents to file requests for actions only a human can take — set up an OAuth credential, sign into a service, click around a feature and provide feedback, copy a file to a path the agent can't reach. Items live as plain JSON files in .ask/ inside any project. No server, no database, no schema setup.

entry.title: flightaware-mcp
entry.content: MCP server for FlightAware AeroAPI — live flight tracking, airports, operators, schedules, and alerts

entry.title: agent
entry.content: Turn Claude Code into a persistent agent — memory, personality, voice, messaging, and more.

entry.title: kagura-memory
entry.content: Kagura Memory Cloud plugin — restore session context, recall & save durable project knowledge, setup help, and an MCP smoke test

entry.title: ai-brain-starter
entry.content: Set up or upgrade an AI-powered Obsidian vault with journaling, knowledge graphs, pattern recognition, and meeting workflows. Includes skills for daily journaling, weekly insights, graphify knowledge graphs, humanizer, and more.

entry.title: invest-A
entry.content: A股多因子交叉验证投研助手。九模块研究备忘录（动态驱动/市场结构/左右侧概率），每条数据引用来源，不做买卖建议。

entry.title: everything-claude-code
entry.content: Complete collection of battle-tested Claude Code configs from an Anthropic hackathon winner - agents, skills, hooks, and rules evolved over 10+ months of intensive daily use

entry.title: mix
entry.content: Mix Flutter styling framework guidance for agents working on Mix code, projects using package:mix, and the Mix monorepo.

entry.title: cortex
entry.content: Syslog management via MCP

entry.title: context-grapple-gun
entry.content: Session learning system for Claude Code. Captures lessons as CogPRs, tracks signals via acoustic routing, promotes knowledge across scopes with human-gated review.

entry.title: river-review
entry.content: Capability pack that strengthens AI review for Claude Code: your team's review criteria as versioned, repo-owned skills (a Skill Registry), driven by a review agent that runs perspective-based reviewer roles (code, security, performance, architecture, testing, adversarial) and verifies findings against the diff so humans keep the high-risk judgment.

entry.title: cowork-to-code-bridge
entry.content: Connect Claude Cowork to Claude Code on your own computer (macOS or Linux). Cowork hands a task to a local Claude Code agent (and can run approved scripts too); the bridge is idempotent, streams progress, and is token-protected. Install with one command; it sets up a global Cowork skill so every session connects automatically — no /plugin, no setup inside Cowork.

entry.title: hero-skills
entry.content: AI Hero agent patterns and workflows for consulting and development

entry.title: claude-dev-skills
entry.content: Personal dev skills: git workflows, code review, project setup, productivity

entry.title: aryaxt-skills
entry.content: Aryan's shared Claude Code skills — iOS dev (simulator/device/testflight), web dev (chrome), Firebase debugging, ship workflows, and decision tooling. Project-specific values come from each project's scripts/ios-config.sh.

entry.title: claude-cost-optimizer
entry.content: Cost-conscious mode for Claude Code. Saves 30-60% on costs through concise responses, model routing, and efficient workflow patterns.

entry.title: ai-config
entry.content: d-morrison's personal Claude Code skills (PR/review workflow, grading, reprexes, R-package helpers) and slash commands.

entry.title: ai-pm-assistant
entry.content: Senior PM co-pilot - converts raw inputs into decision-ready PM artefacts across the full delivery lifecycle

entry.title: claude-github-tools
entry.content: GitHub workflow skills for Claude Code - issue creation, PR review triage, backlog summaries/quick-wins, and GitHub Actions authoring.

entry.title: devpowers
entry.content: Developer productivity skills: GitHub Actions runner and checker, PR/CI status checker, Jira setup and ticket creator, git commit helper, markdown shortener, local/remote Docker debuggers, MCP server setup, and an e2e UI screenshot report generator.

entry.title: seo-kit
entry.content: Real-data SEO + GEO (LLM answer-engine citation) audit toolkit: point it at a URL for a prioritized punch list; free Tier-0 core, paid tiers opt-in.

entry.title: oh-my-gx
entry.content: GX 사업본부 개발자를 위한 개발 자동화 플러그인. PRD, 설계, 구현, 리뷰, PR까지 에이전트 팀이 처리합니다.

entry.title: wicked-testing
entry.content: Standalone QE library — skills-only, 47 skills installed from skills/ directory. 5 Tier-1 orchestrators for user invocation; 40 specialist skills dispatched internally via context:fork.

entry.title: zed
entry.content: Personal Claude Code plugin with custom skills, agents, and tools.

entry.title: overcast
entry.content: Give any agent senses (video/audio/image understanding) and OSINT reach (search/capture/monitor), organized around an investigation case. Built on pi with the tinycloud/Cloudglue perception backend.

entry.title: agentic-os
entry.content: Self-improving agent memory system with 9 skills (session lifecycle, memory management, knowledge sync, policy-gated self-improve) and 6 hooks, including a PreToolUse shell circuit breaker. Identity growth via gated candidate queues; scaling thresholds live in one SSoT script. MCP-Tool-Bridge Policy enforces clear roles (tool/introspection/knowledge) and hard no-gos against MCP-as-truth or cross-project mutation.

entry.title: y2
entry.content: A minimal Claude plugin written in Python that implements hook handlers and logs all hook invocations.

entry.title: networked-thinking-skills
entry.content: Agent Skills for Networked Thinking atomic notes in Obsidian vaults.

entry.title: open-agent-hub
entry.content: Unified capability management center for Skills, Agents, and Commands.

entry.title: juggle
entry.content: Multi-topic conversation orchestrator. Manage parallel conversation threads within a single Claude Code session — discuss one topic while background agents research or build for others.

entry.title: beads-superpowers
entry.content: Superpowers skills + Beads issue tracking for Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, and 6 more AI coding agents. Composable skills + persistent task memory.

entry.title: pdd
entry.content: PDD (Parity-Driven Development) — framework para refactor/rewrite/port de sistemas legados com paridade comportamental rastreável: evidência objetiva (score de confiança + harness de comparação), testes de caracterização, QA como portão de merge, PR-dossiê e painel de progresso.

entry.title: elixir-phoenix-guide
entry.content: Essential Elixir and Phoenix LiveView development guide with enforced skills, hooks, and patterns for idiomatic code

entry.title: navgator
entry.content: Map dependencies and analyze blast radius before changing code

entry.title: rails-upgrade
entry.content: Plan and execute Rails version upgrades following FastRuby.io methodology

entry.title: mindpowers
entry.content: One loop for knowledge work: shape, draft, review, remember. Mindstorming (formerly brainstorming) refines rough ideas into locked specs through Socratic dialogue; drafting turns locked specs into deliverables; reviewing-docs checks any doc against the template's standards; calibrating remembers what you like for next time. Templates cover business reviews, decision docs, PRDs, briefing docs, comms drafts, frameworks, talking points, and post-mortems.

entry.title: cinematic-scroll
entry.content: Build cinematic, scroll-driven websites — pinned chapter reveals, multi-depth parallax, 3D tilt, environment-morphing backgrounds, and full release/launch pages. The motion grammar is the skill; the aesthetic is always the user's. Single self-contained scroll sections (Mode A) or a full Next.js release site with GSAP/Lenis + AI-generated visuals (Mode B), via a 5-phase gated pipeline with taste guardrails, 12 scroll patterns, and a transform/opacity performance budget.

entry.title: wax-skills
entry.content: Agent skills for Wax design-system analysis, registry authoring, and CLI workflows

entry.title: superloopy
entry.content: Lightweight loop harness with strict evidence gates — Claude Code edition.

entry.title: grepr
entry.content: Skills for managing Grepr jobs and pipelines, building grok parsers, querying log data, and debugging log reduction. Requires the Grepr CLI (npm install -g @grepr/cli).

entry.title: fno
entry.content: Set a target. Say f[no] to mostly done.

entry.title: ai-handoff
entry.content: Automatic, integrity-checked handoff and verified memory recall between Claude Code and Codex.

entry.title: arc42-toolkit
entry.content: Provider-agnostic AI skills for creating professional arc42 software architecture documentation. Covers all 12 arc42 sections, cross-section quality review, and automated consistency linting.

entry.title: rauf
entry.content: Authoring, review, guidance, and loop-operation skills for rauf autonomous coding loops. rauf owns the backlog contract; these skills serve both the repo-wide ad-hoc flow and feature-pipeline tools that delegate to them.

entry.title: shiny-maui-shell
entry.content: Claude Code plugin for Shiny MAUI Shell - enhanced .NET MAUI Shell navigation with ViewModel lifecycle management, source generation, and strong-typed navigation

entry.title: trading-desk
entry.content: TradingDesk — a Multi-Agent LLM Financial Trading Framework for agentic coding CLIs (GitHub Copilot CLI, Claude Code, Codex). A re-implementation of TauricResearch/TradingAgents' multi-agent architecture and prompts: a team of specialized analyst, researcher, trader, and risk-management agents that debate and produce a grounded trade decision (Buy/Overweight/Hold/Underweight/Sell). Uses its own data sources and models. Research only — not financial advice.

entry.title: prompt-builder
entry.content: Classify, diagnose, rewrite, and score prompts by model tier and deployment

entry.title: harness-mem
entry.content: Persistent memory system for AI coding sessions — cross-tool memory sharing with 6-dimensional hybrid search

entry.title: forkmind
entry.content: Local-first LLM branching, debugging & context offloading. Treat AI context windows like a Git repo — capture, branch, regression-test LLM calls as a DAG, and archive context as encrypted, restorable capsules. Teaches Claude when and how to drive ForkMind.

entry.title: kratos
entry.content: Multi-agent orchestrator for features, research, and project insights

entry.title: bopen-tools
entry.content: Development agents, skills, hooks, and commands for Claude Code workflows

entry.title: research-plans
entry.content: Plan-based AI research workflows for social science: a lightweight master plan with a status tracker, versioned execution plans per component, an append-only decision log, a plan-quality rubric, and a browser board for review, annotation, and progress tracking.

entry.title: token-usage
entry.content: Attribute Claude Code and Cowork token usage to the work that consumed it — per-command, per-skill, per-agent and per-model breakdowns, cross-session history, live session ledger, and cost estimates

entry.title: adr
entry.content: Complete lifecycle management for Architectural Decision Records (ADRs): create, update, supersede, search, audit compliance, and export

entry.title: nx-plugin-for-aws
entry.content: Scaffold and build cloud-native applications on AWS using @aws/nx-plugin generators. Covers workspace creation, project scaffolding with TypeScript, Python, React, CDK, Terraform, and more.

entry.title: tk
entry.content: SoT gap, route, reflect, learn, ui-diff와 grill/prototype/merge-conflict/handoff/to-prd/to-issues/arch-review를 제공하는 TigerKit Claude Code 플러그인입니다.

entry.title: honestweek
entry.content: Honest, git-verified, private-by-default weekly work summaries from your AI coding sessions.

entry.title: dmj
entry.content: Divya's parallel-first agentic engineering skills: team-based workflows, adversarial verification, security and performance gates from line 1

entry.title: ui-ux-pro-max
entry.content: UI/UX design intelligence. 84 styles, 161 palettes, 73 font pairings, 25 charts, 17 stacks (React, Next.js, Vue, Nuxt.js, Nuxt UI, Svelte, Astro, SwiftUI, React Native, Flutter, Tailwind, shadcn/ui, Jetpack Compose, Angular, Laravel, JavaFX, Three.js). Actions: plan, build, create, design, implement, review, fix, improve, optimize, enhance, refactor, check UI/UX code. Projects: website, landing page, dashboard, admin panel, e-commerce, SaaS, portfolio, blog, mobile app. Elements: button, modal, navbar, sidebar, card, table, form, chart. Styles: glassmorphism, claymorphism, minimalism, brutalism, neumorphism, bento grid, dark mode, responsive, skeuomorphism, flat design. Topics: color palette, accessibility, animation, layout, typography, font pairing, spacing, hover, shadow, gradient.

entry.title: chrisbanes-skills
entry.content: Skills for Kotlin, Android, JVM, and Jetpack Compose development by Chris Banes.

entry.title: skillbooks
entry.content: AI-executed skills for logged-in site access (LinkedIn, Instagram, Facebook, Reddit, Airbnb, Otter, and more), travel and award search, editorial review, and source-cited research.

entry.title: pinpoint
entry.content: Visual annotation for AI coding agents — screenshot anything, annotate regions, get structured feedback

entry.title: hyperframes
entry.content: HyperFrames by HeyGen. Write HTML, render video. Compositions, GSAP and runtime adapter animations, captions, voiceovers, audio-reactive visuals, and website-to-video capture for HyperFrames.

entry.title: kronael
entry.content: Installer for the Kronael toolkit. Trigger by saying 'install kronael', 'install kronael tools', or running /kronael:install. Deploys language patterns (go/py/rs/ts/sql), workflow commands (commit, ship, refine, diary), wisdom skill, and lifecycle hooks (compaction preservation, prompt nudges, stop checks) into ~/.claude/.

entry.title: stdd
entry.content: Spec and test driven development for Claude Code. Enforces spec-first, one-test-at-a-time TDD via slash commands, a PreToolUse guard hook, a git pre-commit gate, and a Stop-hook coverage audit.

entry.title: apple-numbers
entry.content: Read and write Apple Numbers spreadsheets - read tables, create files, update cells, manage sheets/tables, search, import CSV/TSV/JSON, and export data (macOS only)

entry.title: rawgentic
entry.content: 6 SDLC workflow skills + 6 workspace management + 1 planning skill + 2 security skills + hooks for Claude Code: project registration, setup, session binding, requirements interviewing, issue creation, feature implementation, bug fixing, adversarial review, incident response, peer consultation, whole-tree security scanning, security pattern syncing, opt-in operating-charter installation, session-registry housekeeping, and dangerous pattern blocking with per-project exceptions.

entry.title: recoup-skills
entry.content: A record label in a box. Recoup turns your AI agent into a full music team — artist research and analytics, content and short-form video, song analysis, release campaigns, and catalog valuation — all in one install.

entry.title: distillery
entry.content: Knowledge base skills for Claude Code — capture, search, and synthesize project knowledge

entry.title: camunda-migration
entry.content: Claude Code skills for migrating Camunda 7 projects to Camunda 8

entry.title: bd
entry.content: Brilliant Directories integration. Manage members, posts, leads, reviews, web pages, redirects, email templates, forms, menus, tags, widgets, and post-type configurations on any Brilliant Directories website via the public hosted MCP at brilliantmcp.com. Bundles growth-automation skills (/bd:events researches local events and creates SEO-rich event posts; more skills coming).

entry.title: build-loop
entry.content: Multi-phase build orchestration with native debugging: assess, plan, execute, review, iterate. Plan-verify gate on Phase 2. Optional UI design gates. Native debug-loop, debugging-memory, and logging-tracer skills provide root-cause investigation without a bundled MCP server. Orchestrator owns when-to-fire; bundled skills own procedural detail; the logging-tracer skill includes an optional Coding Debugger escalation hop to the standalone supporting plugin for extended capability.

entry.title: caret
entry.content: Review, annotate, and approve Claude Code plans in a local web UI.

entry.title: agent-kevin
entry.content: Portable, file-based personal AI assistant. Compiles raw sessions into a queryable wiki, manages tasks across project lifecycles, drives SEO/web tools (GSC, PageSpeed, SerpAPI, headless browser, web search), and ships 20+ skills covering onboarding, daily/weekly/monthly cadences, audits, and content workflows. All data stays as local markdown + YAML.

entry.title: config-lsp
entry.content: Language Server Protocol configuration for Claude Code

entry.title: answerlayer
entry.content: Query your databases in natural language with AnswerLayer. Bundles the AnswerLayer CLI and a skill that configures your host + API key and drives inquiries, queries, the semantic layer, and dashboards.

entry.title: token-burner
entry.content: Token-saving pipeline at the source: entropy-gated compaction + lossless line-number codec + cross-source novelty gate on tool outputs, warm-start project map, optional RepoMind retrieval. Deterministic, stdlib-only, never breaks a session.

entry.title: flutter-flame-harness
entry.content: Idea-to-store harness for Flutter/Flame games: research (AI idea recommendation), plan, design, contract, generator-evaluator build loop, AdMob, build, screenshot, submit, retro.
